title: DetailCategoryTrend
description: Detail category trend information, broken down by a specific frequency, for a  specific date range.

detailCategoryId.description: The id of the detail category assigned to the transaction.

detailCategoryName.description: The name of the detail category assigned to the transaction.

debitTotal.description: The sum of all debit transactions associated with the detail category for the specific duration.

creditTotal.description: The sum of all credit transactions associated with the detail category for the specific duration.

netTotal.description: Net spending calculated as (debitTotal - creditTotal) associated with  the detail category for the specific duration.

averageNetTotal.description: Average spending calculated as (netTotal)/(Number of Months)  associated with the detail category for the specific duration.

detail.description: Breakdown of income/spending based on a predefined frequency - typically, monthly.
